Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Goal Construct a Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model in pm4py format for a given scenario Format Requirements The dictionary must contain specific keys existence absence exactly one init responded existence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the first group existence absence exactly one init the value is a dictionary where keys are activities and values are dictionaries with support and confidence For binary relations it probably means keys are tuples of activities for binary constraints I will follow standard pm4py DECLARE model format keys are tuples for binary constraints and single strings for unary constraints

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: It does not specify the exact inner structure but typically in pm4py it is support 1 0 and confidence 0 85 or similar I will assume support 1 0 confidence value

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activities IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to define constraints that make sense for this process I will create a plausible set of DECLARE constraints covering the required keys

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: init Which activity starts the process IG Idea Generation Confidence 1 0

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: existence Which activities must occur at least once All of them probably I will pick a few key ones IG DD AG FL Confidence 1 0

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: absence Which activities must NOT occur Maybe none I will leave it empty for simplicity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: exactly one Which activity occurs exactly once FL Confidence 1 0

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: responded existence If TFC occurs CE must occur at least once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: coexistence LT and UT both happen or neither

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response DD implies TFC later

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: precedence PC requires TFC before it

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: succession AG and MP are linked as mutual response and precedence

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: altresponse CE to PC altprecedence LT to UT altsuccession PC to LT

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: chainresponse MP to FL chainprecedence TFC to CE chainsuccession IG to DD

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: noncoexistence UT and FL both occur that is bad lets pick something better I will change it and reconsider because the scenario does not clearly specify mutually exclusive activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In pm4py DECLARE models unary constraints use activity keys and binary constraints use tuple keys The values are dicts with support and confidence I will follow this

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to make sure I cover all keys listed in the prompt All 18 keys are present

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check against prompt requirements unary keys have activity keys and support confidence values yes binary keys have activity tuple keys and support confidence values yes support is 1 0 yes
